objective: Harden PR and closeout surfaces so structured handoff package evidence is requested in PRs and validated by the Stage 6 closeout hook before graph/wiki refresh.
scope_boundary: Update the PR template handoff evidence checklist.
Update the closeout template with required handoff evidence prompts.
Add a deterministic closeout validator and focused tests.
Call the closeout validator from hooks/closeout-hook.sh before graph/wiki refresh.
Update issue #436 evidence, backlog/progress mirrors, validation, review, and closeout artifacts.
out_of_scope: Changing package-handoff schema semantics beyond closeout surface enforcement.
Changing packet queue dispatch behavior; completed by issue #437.
Changing Local CI or reusable GitHub handoff validator triggers; completed by issue #435.
research_summary: Issues #438, #435, and #437 established schemas, CI validation, and packet dispatch reconciliation. The remaining gap is the user-facing and Stage 6 closeout surface: PR authors must provide the package evidence, and closeout must fail before graph/wiki refresh when referenced artifacts are missing or residual follow-ups are not issue-backed.

sprints.name: PR and closeout evidence hardening
sprints.goal: Make handoff package evidence visible in the PR template and enforceable during closeout before graph/wiki refresh.
tasks: Add PR template fields for structured plan, execution scope, handoff package, validation, review/gate artifacts, Local CI evidence, closeout, and packet queue state.
Add closeout template prompts for the same evidence and handoff lifecycle recording.
Add scripts/overlord/validate_closeout.py to check required evidence refs, referenced artifact existence, issue-backed residuals, and handoff lifecycle recording.
Call the closeout validator from hooks/closeout-hook.sh before graph/wiki refresh.
Add focused tests for missing referenced artifacts, missing issue-backed residuals, missing handoff lifecycle recording, and hook integration order.
Update issue mirrors and governance evidence.
acceptance_criteria: PR template requires structured plan path, execution scope path, handoff package path, validation artifact path, review/gate artifact refs, Local CI report or command result, closeout path, and packet queue state where applicable.
Closeout hook validates referenced plan/scope/handoff/validation/review/gate artifacts exist before graph/wiki refresh.
Closeout hook verifies residual risks and follow-ups are issue-backed or explicitly none.
Closeout hook records or validates lifecycle transition to accepted/released where a handoff package exists.
Tests cover missing closeout artifact refs and missing issue-backed residuals.

specialist_reviews.focus: PR template, closeout hook, closeout validator, and focused tests.
specialist_reviews.summary: The local Claude Sonnet 4.6 worker process hung without returning output and was killed after a bounded wait. It left no file changes; Codex QA implemented the slice.

specialist_reviews.focus: Issue #436 acceptance criteria, closeout evidence validator behavior, and deterministic gates.
specialist_reviews.summary: Add a closeout validator as a pre-graph hook gate and keep the PR/closeout templates aligned with the package handoff evidence chain.

alternate_model_review.summary: Claude Opus 4.6 approved with changes. Codex QA completed the required lifecycle-line, gate-evidence, and placeholder-test conditions.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Implement governance-only PR template, closeout template, closeout hook validator, tests, issue plan/scope/handoff evidence, validation, review, and closeout for issue #436.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run focused validation, cross-review, Local CI Gate, closeout, PR, and automerge if green.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: PR template exposes all handoff package evidence fields.
Closeout hook invokes closeout validator before graph/wiki refresh.
Closeout validator fails on missing referenced artifacts and unissued residual risks.
Local CI Gate passes before merge.

material_deviation_rules: If downstream repos need propagation, create downstream issues instead of editing them here.
If package-handoff schema semantics need new lifecycle states, create a follow-up issue instead of expanding this slice.
If Sonnet worker tooling is unavailable or hangs, record the attempt and continue with Codex QA plus alternate-family review.
